questionHtml:
What is the major product of the reaction between HCl and but-2-ene?

A. 1,2-dichlorobutane

B. 2,3-dichlorobutane

C. 1-chlorobutane

D. 2-chlorobutane

meta.title: What is the major product of the reaction between HCl and but-2-ene? A. 1,2-dichlorobutane B. 2,3-dichlorobutane C. 1-chlorobutane D. 2-chlorobutane
